column1: # Differential oracle table — the machine-readable contract diffharness.sh reads.
# Tab-separated. Lines starting with '#' and blank lines are ignored.
# Columns:
#   case              fixture id (dir under cases/ or the fixture-inject id)
#   kind              crate           = standalone dep-free crate at cases/<case>/
#                     fixture-inject  = copy bench/fixture/ + apply <inject>
#   run_wasm          1 = the wasm32-unknown-unknown oracle is REQUIRED ground
#                         truth for this case; target-missing => BLOCKER (never
#                         a silent skip — that would be a harness false-GREEN)
#                     0 = wasm not part of this case's ground truth
#   run_clippy        1 = clippy -D warnings oracle is part of ground truth
#   ground_truth      GREEN|RED — the canonical correct color (host[+wasm][+clippy])
#   cargoless_base    GREEN|RED — HONEST documented v0.2.0 behavior. Where this
#                     differs from ground_truth it records a CURRENTLY-SHIPPING
#                     false-GREEN. This column is the "no we-already-win" ledger.
#   inc3_required     GREEN|RED — required cargoless color when Increment-3 is
#                     COMPLETE (always == ground_truth; explicit for clarity)
#   klass             MATCH-NOW = must already bit-match; a mismatch is a
#                                 REGRESSION (launch-class)
#                     GAP-INC3  = documented false-GREEN an Increment-3 increment
#                                 is responsible for closing
#   inject            for kind=fixture-inject: anchor token | env (else "-")
#case
clean
type-err
proc-macro
test-only-err
clippy-warn
wasm-only-err
